name: Scanning honest code returns high Trust Score with no findings
description: When a user pastes a clean diff with no cheating patterns into the Scan page and submits, the app returns a high Trust Score (80 or above) and shows zero findings or explicitly states the code is clean.

planSteps.description: Click the Scan or Analyze button to submit the diff
The Trust Score displayed is 80 or higher, indicating clean and honest code
The findings section shows zero findings, or displays a message confirming no suspicious patterns were detected
